name: Onomatopia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>希</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>望</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>郷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－オノマトピア－
desc: Each time a "Utopia" monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field, place 1 Hi-Five the Sky Counter on this card. Monsters you control gain 200 ATK/DEF for each Hi-Five the Sky Counter on this card. Once per turn: You can remove 2 Hi-Five the Sky Counters from this card; Special Summon 1 "Zubaba", "Gagaga", "Gogogo", or "Dododo" monster from your Deck.
eff: Each time a "Utopia" monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field, place 1 Hi-Five the Sky Counter on this card. Monsters you control gain 200 ATK/DEF for each Hi-Five the Sky Counter on this card. Once per turn: You can remove 2 Hi-Five the Sky Counters from this card; Special Summon 1 "Zubaba", "Gagaga", "Gogogo", or "Dododo" monster from your Deck.

counter: Removes counters from itself for cost
